§6Steam Age: Industrial Processing§f

§aRun heavy processing machinery on pure, raw steam pressure without needing electricity!§f
§9NuclearCraft Additions§f introduces steam-powered versions of classic manufacturing blocks. Running entirely on pressurized steam, these machines allow you to crush ores, compact sheets, and transform chemical compounds long before you build your first high-output generators.

§6Steam Processing Suite§f:
§b• Steam Compactor§f: Uses physical hydraulic pressure to compress materials, allowing you to manufacture advanced metal sheets, plates, and dense plates.
§b• Steam Crusher§f: Grinds down ores and rocks into dusts, giving you basic ore-doubling capabilities early on.
§b• Steam Transformer & Fluid Transformer§f: Process up to four inputs into advanced chemical products and high-tier alloy components.
§b• Steam Washer & Steam Blender§f: Purify dusts and blend components to create specialized composite materials.

§cCRITICAL UPGRADE BUG WARNING§f:
§cThere is a severe, known mod bug with the Steam Transformer!§f During operation, the Steam Transformer will §ceat Speed Upgrades§f placed inside it, permanently deleting them from existence.
§eUntil this bug is resolved§f, it is §cstrongly recommended to avoid§f installing any speed or energy upgrades inside the §bSteam Transformer§f. Run it at its default speed to preserve your resources.
